hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && pre-commit run --files $(git diff --cached --name-only | tr '\n' ' ') 2>&1 || true; fi
